persona: A competitive 11th grader who feels overwhelmed by AP classes
starting_prompt: I have three projects due this week plus regular homework and I'm completely overwhelmed. I don't know where to start and I feel like crying.

persona: A 9th grader anxious about their first high school exams
starting_prompt: I have a big test tomorrow and I'm so anxious I can't sleep. My heart is racing and I keep thinking about all the ways I might fail.

persona: A 12th grader stressed about college applications
starting_prompt: I'm so worried about getting into college that I can't sleep. Every grade feels like it determines my entire future and I feel overwhelmed by the pressure.

persona: A 10th grader afraid of public speaking
starting_prompt: I have to give a presentation next week and I'm already feeling panicky just thinking about it. What if I forget what to say or start shaking?

persona: A new student struggling to make friends at a new school
starting_prompt: I'm the new kid at school and everyone already has their friend groups. I sit alone at lunch and feel invisible.

persona: A teenager feeling pressured by their friends to skip class
starting_prompt: My friends want me to skip class with them and I don't want to, but I'm scared they won't like me if I say no.

persona: A 10th grader feeling left out by their friend group
starting_prompt: My friends have been hanging out without me and I don't know why. It really hurts.

persona: A teenager whose best friend betrayed their trust
starting_prompt: My best friend shared my secret with other people and now I feel so betrayed and angry. I don't know if I can trust them anymore.

persona: A teenager being pressured to join in bullying
starting_prompt: Everyone in my group is making fun of this kid and they expect me to join in, but I don't want to be mean.

persona: A student being targeted by online harassment
starting_prompt: Someone is posting mean comments about me online and I don't know how to make it stop. I'm embarrassed for everyone to see.

persona: A teenager whose embarrassing photo was shared online without consent
starting_prompt: Someone shared an embarrassing photo of me without permission and now everyone at school has seen it.

persona: A 9th grader being teased for their appearance
starting_prompt: Kids at school keep making fun of my clothes and the way I talk. I come home crying almost every day and I hate school now.

persona: A teenager struggling with their parents' divorce
starting_prompt: My parents are going through a divorce and I don't know how to talk to friends about it. I feel embarrassed and different.

persona: A student feeling immense pressure from their parents to get perfect grades
starting_prompt: My parents expect me to get perfect grades and be involved in everything. I feel so much pressure and we fight when I can't meet their expectations.

persona: A teenager constantly fighting with their parents over rules
starting_prompt: My parents have so many rules and I feel like they don't trust me. We keep fighting about it and I'm angry all the time.

persona: A teenager feeling misunderstood by their family
starting_prompt: No one in my family understands what I'm going through. When I try to explain how I feel, they just tell me I'm being dramatic or too sensitive.

persona: A student feeling anxious and sad for no reason
starting_prompt: I've been feeling really anxious and sad lately but I don't want people to think something's wrong with me or that I'm weak.

persona: A teenager feeling hopeless and that nothing is fun anymore
starting_prompt: I feel sad and empty most of the time lately. Nothing seems fun anymore and I don't see the point in trying because everything feels hopeless.

persona: A perfectionist student who is extremely self-critical
starting_prompt: I can't turn in my assignment because it's not perfect yet. I keep working on it but it's never good enough and I'm scared to submit something that isn't flawless.

persona: A teenager who feels lonely even when surrounded by people
starting_prompt: I feel lonely even when I'm around people. I don't feel like anyone really knows me or cares about me, and I feel empty inside.

persona: A teenager questioning their gender identity
starting_prompt: I don't feel comfortable with the gender everyone thinks I am, but I'm scared to talk about it because people might not understand.

persona: A student feeling insecure about their physical appearance
starting_prompt: I hate how I look compared to other kids. I'm too short/tall/heavy and I feel ugly and different from everyone else.

persona: A teenager comparing themselves to 'perfect' lives on social media
starting_prompt: Everyone on social media looks perfect and has amazing lives, and I feel ugly and boring compared to them. Social media makes me feel terrible about myself.

persona: A multicultural student feeling caught between two cultures
starting_prompt: I feel caught between two cultures and I don't really fit in anywhere. At home I'm not American enough, at school I'm not white enough.

persona: A teenager who feels like they have to pretend to be someone else to fit in
starting_prompt: I feel pressure to act a certain way to fit in, but it doesn't feel like the real me.

persona: A student-athlete scared of letting their team down
starting_prompt: I made an error that cost our team the game and now I feel terrible. I don't want to play anymore because I let everyone down.

persona: A performer with intense stage fright before a recital
starting_prompt: I have a piano recital next month and I'm terrified I'll forget the song or make mistakes in front of the audience.

persona: An artist who is afraid to share their work for fear of criticism
starting_prompt: I want to share my artwork online but I'm scared people will criticize it or steal my ideas.

persona: A student who wants to try a new hobby but is afraid of being bad at it
starting_prompt: I want to try photography but everyone who does it seems so talented already. I'm worried I'll be terrible at it.

persona: A teenager dealing with the grief of losing a pet
starting_prompt: My dog died and I can't stop crying. I feel so sad and empty, and I miss him so much it hurts.

persona: A student whose best friend is moving away
starting_prompt: My best friend moved away and I feel so sad and empty. I try to stay in touch but it's not the same and I feel lonely.

persona: A teenager whose parents broke a promise, causing disappointment
starting_prompt: My parents promised we could go to the amusement park but now they cancelled because of work. I feel disappointed and angry that they broke their promise.

persona: A student struggling with the anniversary of a loved one's death
starting_prompt: It's been a year since my pet died and I thought I was doing better, but this week I feel just as sad as when it first happened. I don't understand why I'm so upset again.

persona: A teenager struggling with body image due to acne
starting_prompt: I have really bad acne and I feel like it's all anyone sees when they look at me. I don't want to go to school dances or social events.

persona: A student feeling self-conscious about needing glasses or braces
starting_prompt: I just got glasses and I feel like they make me look nerdy. Kids are making jokes and I want to stop wearing them.

persona: A teenager uncomfortable with their body changing during puberty
starting_prompt: I'm going through puberty and my body is changing in weird ways. I feel awkward and different from my friends.

persona: A student worried about their eating habits
starting_prompt: I think I weigh more than other kids my age and I'm embarrassed to change for gym class or go swimming.

persona: A high school student worried about their future career path
starting_prompt: I don't know what I want to do when I grow up and it makes me anxious. Everyone else seems to have it figured out and I feel lost and behind.

persona: A teenager feeling overwhelmed by the need to balance school, work, and social life
starting_prompt: I have so many activities and responsibilities that I never have time just to relax or hang out with friends.

persona: A student who procrastinates and is worried about deadlines
starting_prompt: I always procrastinate on homework and then feel stressed trying to finish everything at the last minute.

persona: A teenager struggling to manage their money
starting_prompt: I always spend my allowance right away on things I don't really need and then I don't have money for things I want later.

persona: A student who feels they are not good at anything
starting_prompt: I feel like I'm not good at anything and everyone else is better than me at everything. I don't know what's wrong with me.

persona: A teenager having trouble sleeping
starting_prompt: I've been having trouble falling asleep lately. My mind races and I just lie there for hours.

persona: A student feeling pressure to have a romantic relationship
starting_prompt: All my friends are in relationships and I feel like there's something wrong with me for being single.

persona: A teenager questioning their sexuality
starting_prompt: I think I might be gay but I'm terrified of how my family and friends will react if I tell them.

persona: A student who feels their anger is out of control
starting_prompt: I got so angry today that I screamed at my little sister and threw my book across the room. Now I feel bad but I was just so frustrated I couldn't control myself.

persona: A teenager who is the victim of rumors
starting_prompt: Someone is spreading rumors about me and now other kids look at me weird. I feel angry and embarrassed and don't want to face anyone.

persona: A student who is struggling with a long-distance friendship
starting_prompt: My best friend moved away, and even though we text, it's not the same. I'm worried we're drifting apart.

persona: A teenager feeling guilty about their feelings towards a step-family
starting_prompt: My mom remarried and now I have to share her with my stepdad and his kids. I feel jealous and angry but also guilty for not being happy about our new family.
